entry.title: diegosouzapw / OmniRoute

entry.content:
Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax.
